STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRO-TEMPS PROFESSIONAL PERSONNEL, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY FDBA PROFESSIONAL TEMPORARY'S ESPINOZA, SALVADOR INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ESPINOZA FAMILY TRUST FOR THE BENEFIT OF SALVADOR ESPINOZA AND SANDRA ANN ESPINOZA OR THEIR SUCCESSORS IN TRUST, UNDER INSTRUMENT DATED NOVEMBER 8, 1996 ESPINOZA, KANELA SALVADOR ESPINOZA AND SANDRA ANN ESPINOZA TRUSTEES OF THE ESPINOZA FAMILY TRUST FOR THE BENEFIT OF SALVADOR ESPINOZA AND SANDRA ANN ESPINOZA OR THEIR SUCCESSORS IN TRUST, UNDER INSTRUMENT DATED NOVEMBER 8, 1996. $38,948.94 PRINCIPAL, $1,300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,268.67 INTEREST, $471.00 COSTS, $665.26 LATE CHARGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $44,653.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-04-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
